instruction: Create a list of drip coffee makers that are on sale and within $25-60 and have a black finish.

evaluator.eval: check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_url_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'parse_keys': ['q']}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': {'q': 'drip coffee maker'}, 'expect_in_result': True}})) and check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_html_parse(env, config={'goto_prefix': 'https://www.', 'category': 'class', 'class_multiObject_search_exist': {'fT28tf': ['Black', '$25 - $60', 'On sale', 'is_other_exist']}}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': {'Black': True, '$25 - $60': True, 'On sale': True, 'is_other_exist': False}}}))
